description:
Advances: specled.coverage_capture

lib/specled_ex/coverage/store.ex: v2 envelope %{version, mode, generated_at, source, files, mfas, payload, degraded}; read/1 -> {:ok, env} | {:error, :legacy_artifact | :invalid_artifact}; refuse writing empty-files envelopes; read_status/1 for the last_run.status sidecar ({:ok, stats} | {:refused, reason}) written on every flush/ingest. Decision 5: legacy artifacts are REJECTED with a clear message naming the re-run command (mix spec.cover.test) — no auto-migrate/delete. Include envelope round-trip tests + legacy-rejection tests.
title: T1: Store v2 envelope, validation, legacy rejection, last_run.status sidecar
